headlines.title: Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh takes on a starring role in Maine’s Senate race
headlines.description: In a time of war and rising prices, Democrats in Maine say another issue is motivating them in the Senate race: Brett Kavanaugh’s Supreme Court confirmation eight years ago.

headlines.title: Trump nominates Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence
headlines.description: President Donald Trump announced Thursday that he’s nominating Jay Clayton, the U.S.

headlines.title: Republicans who pushed Epstein files release see political careers upended by Trump
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has taken political revenge on all four Republicans who signed onto the Epstein files release law.

headlines.title: Trump nominates Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence
headlines.description: In a social media post, President Trump said he is nominating U.S. Attorney for the Southern District of New York Jay Clayton to serve as the next director of national intelligence. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on the president's pick and the controversy surrounding Acting Director of National Intelligence Bill Pulte.

headlines.title: Trump calls off planned strikes on Iran amid progress towards a deal
headlines.description: In a post on social media, President Trump says he called off planned strikes on Iran and signaled he expected a deal between countries to be agreed to soon.

headlines.title: Leadership vacuum plaguing U.S. health agencies
headlines.description: A wave of firings and resignations at the highest levels of the CDC and the FDA suggests the Trump administration may be pivoting away from facets of the "Make America Healthy Again" movement. NBC News' Aria Bendix reports.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Florida Supreme Court rejects challenge to new GOP-drawn congressional maps
headlines.description: Florida’s newly drawn congressional lines will be used during the 2026 midterm elections, after the state Supreme Court rejected an attempt by outside groups to block the new Republican-drawn plan

headlines.title: Brad Lander found not guilty of charges in incident at NYC immigration detention center
headlines.description: A New York judge ruled Thursday that congressional hopeful Brad Lander is not guilty of misdemeanor charges against him related to a September inspection attempt at an immigration holding facility in Manhattan.“I feel genuinely moved today by the rule of law — by the excellent legal counsel I had, by the thoughtful consideration by the judge, and by the simple knowledge that I could enter and leave the court safely,” Lander, a close political ally of Mayor Zohran Mamdani, said at a news co

headlines.title: Trump’s UFC matches are unprecedented, but sports at the White House aren’t
headlines.description: The UFC matches to be held on the lawn of the White House on President Donald Trump’s 80th birthday are sure to be a spectacle unseen in the history of the storied complex

headlines.title: Vance’s chief of staff to leave Trump administration
headlines.description: Jacob Reses, the chief of staff to Vice President JD Vance, will leave the administration at the end of the summer, people close to the vice president’s office said Thursday

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.
